body.title: After-action capture: high-salience conversation deposits to matrix
body.result: Created after_action_reviewer.py: scans CC: prefixed interaction turns, calls Ollama to extract key learnings (falls back to raw Q&A if unavailable), deposits as FACTUAL source=after_action_review with learned_from metadata. Seeded PROC_AFTER_ACTION habit (schedule_interval_sec=7200). 9 tests. Fixed test isolation issue (sys.modules stub pollution) in test_scope_guard.py too.
body.description: After any high-salience conversation (not just design sessions — any exchange with a more knowledgeable agent, or where self-programming goal lends salience), Igor should deposit key learnings to matrix as FACTUALs. Pattern: army after-action review. Trigger: salience > threshold on completed conversation turn. Goal: self-programming context lends salience so design/architecture conversations auto-qualify. Generalizes beyond coding — applies to Akien, Claude, any upstream knowledgeable agent.
